config.script:
#include "50200" 'qxx_publication #include "50217" 'realize publication #include "50518"
'MessageBox #include "50122"
class cn5dokmag_oper_config public m_strName public m_cCreateTask
public m_cFillIdeal public m_eTypRej public m_cCollector
public m_idObjDPC_1 public m_idObjDPC_2
public m_cFromEE public m_cFromRW public m_cCollectorExt public m_cDrukEtykiet
public sub class_initialize() m_strName = "" m_cCreateTask = "0" m_cFillIdeal = "0" m_cCollector = "0" m_cFromEE = "0" m_idObjDPC_1 = 0 'no DP to perform m_idObjDPC_2 = 0 'no DP to perform m_cFromRW = "0" m_cCollectorExt = "0" m_cDrukEtykiet = "0" end sub
public property get is_empty() is_empty = (m_cCreateTask = "0") and _ (m_cCollector = "0") and _ (m_cFillIdeal = "0") and _ (m_idObjDPC_1 = clng(0)) and _ (m_idObjDPC_2 = clng(0)) and _ (m_cFromEE = "0") and _ (m_cFromRW = "0") and _ (m_cCollectorExt = "0") and _ (m_cDrukEtykiet = "0") end property
public sub load_from_string(byref strConfig) dim aItems : aItems = split(strConfig, vbTab) 'db4 - ok if ubound(aItems) > 4 then m_strName = aItems(0) m_cCreateTask = left(aItems(1),1) m_idObjDPC_1 = clng(aItems(2)) m_idObjDPC_2 = clng(aItems(3)) m_cFillIdeal = cstr(aItems(4)) m_cCollector = cstr(aItems(5)) end if
if ubound(aItems) > 5 then m_cFromEE = left(aItems(6),1) end if
if ubound(aItems) > 6 then m_cFromRW = cstr(aItems(7)) end if
if ubound(aItems) > 7 then m_cCollectorExt = cstr(aItems(8)) end if
if ubound(aItems) > 8 then m_cDrukEtykiet = left(aItems(9),1) end if
end sub
public function save_to_string save_to_string = doc_.afc.convert.formatter("%1"+vbTab+"%2"+vbTab+"%3"+vbTab+"%4"+vbTab+"%5"+vbTab+"%6"+vbTab+"%7"+vbTab+"%8"+vbTab+"%9"+vbTab+"%10") _ (m_strName)(cstr(m_cCreateTask))(cstr(m_idObjDPC_1))(cstr(m_idObjDPC_2))(cstr(m_cFillIdeal))(cstr(m_cCollector))(cstr(m_cFromEE))_ (cstr(m_cFromRW))(cstr(m_cCollectorExt))(cstr(m_cDrukEtykiet)).done() end function
public sub show_config_page dim pPage : set pPage = doc_.getpagehli("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=THIS_FILE")
pPage.topelement.title = "Konfiguracja operacji """ + m_strName + """"
pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_CREATE_TASK).value = m_cCreateTask pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_FROM_EE).value = m_cFromEE pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_SHOW_COLLECTOR).value = m_cCollector pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_FILL_IDEAL).value = m_cFillIdeal pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_FROM_RW).value = m_cFromRW pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_SHOW_COLLECTOR_EXT).value = m_cCollectorExt pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_DRUK_ETYK).value = m_cDrukEtykiet 'todo: otwieranie i wybór
dim bHideFillIdeal : bHideFillIdeal = true
dim bHideDrukEtyk: bHideDrukEtyk = true dim strPubType : strPubType = "" select case m_eTypRej case N5REJESTRDOK__WZ strPubType = "N5DPC_PUBTYPE_WZ" case N5REJESTRDOK__PZ strPubType = "N5DPC_PUBTYPE_PZ" case N5REJESTRDOK__PW strPubType = "N5DPC_PUBTYPE_PW" #ifdef _IOW bHideDrukEtyk = false #endif case N5REJESTRDOK__RW strPubType = "N5DPC_PUBTYPE_RW" #ifdef _IOW bHideDrukEtyk = false #endif case N5REJESTRDOK__PP strPubType = "N5DPC_PUBTYPE_PP" case N5REJESTRDOK__ZZ strPubType = "N5DPC_PUBTYPE_ZZ" case N5REJESTRDOK__ZD strPubType = "N5DPC_PUBTYPE_ZD" case N5REJESTRDOK__IR strPubType = "N5DPC_PUBTYPE_IR" case N5REJESTRDOK__IP strPubType = "N5DPC_PUBTYPE_IP" case N5REJESTRDOK__MM,N5REJESTRDOK__MR,N5REJESTRDOK__MP strPubType = "N5DPC_PUBTYPE_MM" #ifdef _IOW bHideDrukEtyk = false #endif bHideFillIdeal = false end select
setup_choose_dpc_pic pPage,CTRLID_PIC_DPC_1,CTRLID_DPC_1_PREVIEW,CTRLID_DPC_1,m_idObjDPC_1,strPubType setup_choose_dpc_pic pPage,CTRLID_PIC_DPC_2,CTRLID_DPC_2_PREVIEW,CTRLID_DPC_2,m_idObjDPC_2,strPubType setup_choose_dpc_label pPage,CTRLID_DPC_1,abs(m_idObjDPC_1) setup_choose_dpc_label pPage,CTRLID_DPC_2,abs(m_idObjDPC_2) setup_choose_dpc_preview pPage , CTRLID_DPC_1_PREVIEW , m_idObjDPC_1 setup_choose_dpc_preview pPage , CTRLID_DPC_2_PREVIEW , m_idObjDPC_2
pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_FILL_IDEAL).hide = bHideFillIdeal
#ifdef _KOMPOZYTY if m_eTypRej <> N5REJESTRDOK__PW then pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_FROM_RW).hide = true end if #else pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_FROM_RW).hide = true #endif #ifdef _HJORT if m_eTypRej <> N5REJESTRDOK__MM then pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_SHOW_COLLECTOR_EXT).hide = true end if #else pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_SHOW_COLLECTOR_EXT).hide = true #endif
pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_DRUK_ETYK).hide = bHideDrukEtyk
if pPage.domodalauto() = CMD_CHOICE then m_cCreateTask = pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_CREATE_TASK).value m_cFromEE = pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_FROM_EE).value m_cCollector = pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_SHOW_COLLECTOR).value m_cFillIdeal = pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_FILL_IDEAL).value m_cFromRW = pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_FROM_RW).value m_cCollectorExt = pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_SHOW_COLLECTOR_EXT).value m_idObjDPC_1 = get_choosen_dpc(pPage,CTRLID_PIC_DPC_1,CTRLID_DPC_1_PREVIEW) m_idObjDPC_2 = get_choosen_dpc(pPage,CTRLID_PIC_DPC_2,CTRLID_DPC_2_PREVIEW) m_cDrukEtykiet = pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_DRUK_ETYK).value end if end sub public sub perform_operation(byref pObject , byref pPage) perform_operation_on_config Me, pObject , pPage end sub end class
class cn5dokmag_dok_config private m_aOperations(COUNT_OPERATIONS_INX) public m_eTypRej
public sub class_initialize() dim i for i = 0 to COUNT_OPERATIONS set m_aOperations(i) = new cn5dokmag_oper_config next end sub
public function is_empty(byval nNumOper) dim pOperConf:set pOperConf = m_aOperations(nNumOper) is_empty = pOperConf.is_empty end function
public sub setTypeRej(eTypRej) m_eTypRej = eTypRej dim i for i = 0 to COUNT_OPERATIONS m_aOperations(i).m_eTypRej = m_eTypRej next end sub
public sub init_with_defaults(nTypRej) dim i for i = 0 to COUNT_OPERATIONS set m_aOperations(i) = new cn5dokmag_oper_config next
setTypeRej nTypRej
select case nTypRej case N5REJESTRDOK__PZ m_aOperations(2).m_strName = "Wydruk PZ" 'todo: wyszukanie publikacji: m_aOperations(1).m_idObjDPC_1 case N5REJESTRDOK__WZ m_aOperations(2).m_strName = "Wydruk WZ" 'todo: wyszukanie publikacji: m_aOperations(1).m_idObjDPC_1 case N5REJESTRDOK__PW m_aOperations(2).m_strName = "Wydruk PW" 'todo: wyszukanie publikacji: m_aOperations(1).m_idObjDPC_1 case N5REJESTRDOK__RW m_aOperations(2).m_strName = "Wydruk RW" 'todo: wyszukanie publikacji: m_aOperations(1).m_idObjDPC_1 end select end sub
public sub load_from_string(byref strConfig) dim aItems : aItems = split(strConfig, REJDOK_CONG_SEPARATOR) dim i dim last : last = ubound(aItems) if last > COUNT_OPERATIONS then last = COUNT_OPERATIONS end if for i = 0 to last m_aOperations(i).load_from_string aItems(i) next end sub
public function save_to_string dim strTotal : strTotal = "" dim i for i = 0 to COUNT_OPERATIONS strTotal = strTotal + m_aOperations(i).save_to_string() + REJDOK_CONG_SEPARATOR next save_to_string = strTotal end function
public property get operation_name(byval nOperNr) operation_name = m_aOperations(nOperNr).m_strName end property public property let operation_name(byval nOperNr,byref strName) m_aOperations(nOperNr).m_strName = strName end property
public sub show_config_page(byval nOperNr) m_aOperations(nOperNr).show_config_page end sub public sub perform_operation(nOperNr,byref pObject,byref pPage) #ifdef _DEBUG trans_.message 1002 , 0 , "DEBUG: " + cstr(operation_name(nOperNr)) #endif m_aOperations(nOperNr).perform_operation pObject , pPage end sub end class
function create_config_object(byref pRejestr) dim pNewConfig : set pNewConfig = new cn5dokmag_dok_config pNewConfig.setTypeRej pRejestr.eTyp set create_config_object = pNewConfig end function
'--------------------------- config page ------------------ function fok page_.result = CMD_CHOICE page_.goback end function
function fcancel page_.goback end function
'--------------------------- perform operation ------------------ private sub perform_operation_on_config(byref pConfig,byref pDokMag , byref pPage)
if not make_task_on_dokmag(pConfig.m_cCreateTask,pDokMag,pPage) then exit sub end if
if not make_publication_on_dokmag(pConfig.m_idObjDPC_1,pDokMag,pPage) then exit sub end if
if not make_publication_on_dokmag(pConfig.m_idObjDPC_2,pDokMag,pPage) then exit sub end if
if not fill_ideal_on_dokmag(pConfig.m_cFillIdeal,pDokMag,pPage) then exit sub end if
if not FillFromCollector(pConfig.m_cCollector,pDokMag,pPage,false) then exit sub end if
if not FillFromCollector(pConfig.m_cCollectorExt,pDokMag,pPage,true) then exit sub end if
if not fill_from_ewid_etyk(pConfig.m_cFromEE,pDokMag,pPage) then exit sub end if
if not fill_from_rw(pConfig.m_cFromRW,pDokMag,pPage) then exit sub end if
if not drukuj_kody_kreskowe(pConfig.m_cDrukEtykiet,pDokMag,pPage) then exit sub end if
end sub
function fill_ideal_on_dokmag(cFillIdeal, byref pDokMag, byref pPage) fill_ideal_on_dokmag = doc_.getmodule(60197).fill_ideal_on_dokmag(cFillIdeal, pDokMag, pPage) end function
private function drukuj_kody_kreskowe(cWypelnij,byref pDokMag , byref pPage) : drukuj_kody_kreskowe = true
'u60195 if cWypelnij = "0" then exit function end if
drukuj_kody_kreskowe = false
dim oProdukt dim oNXArrayIdobj : set oNXArrayIdobj = nx_.new_array() dim oNXArrayIlosc : set oNXArrayIlosc = nx_.new_array()
dim poz_dok for each poz_dok in pDokMag.listPozycje set oProdukt=poz_dok.pProdukt oNXArrayIdobj.add oProdukt.idobj oNXArrayIlosc.add CLng(poz_dok.curIloscOpak) next dim pM60313 : set pM60313 = doc_.getmodule(60313) pM60313.uruchom oNXArrayIdobj,oNXArrayIlosc,pDokMag
end function
'--------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' wypełnia dokument magazynowy jeśli użytkownik wciśnie "wczytaj" ' albo wysyła bazę artykułów do kolektora '--------------------------------------------------------------------------------- function FillFromCollector(idObjDPC, byref pDokMag, byref pPage, byval bMode)
FillFromCollector = doc_.getmodule(60194).FillFromCollectorExt(idObjDPC, pDokMag, pPage, bMode)
end function '--------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' dodaje pozycje do dokumentu magazynowego '--------------------------------------------------------------------------------- sub DokmagAddPoz(byref pDokMag,byval pProdukt,byval lp , byval ilosc, byval cena)
doc_.getmodule(60194).DokmagAddPoz pDokMag, pProdukt,lp , ilosc, cena
end sub '--------------------------------------------------------------------------------- function make_task_on_dokmag(cCreateTask,byref pDokMag,byref pPage) : make_task_on_dokmag = true
if cCreateTask = "0" then exit function end if
if pPage.std_fsave_external_with_saveobjects() then make_task_on_dokmag = false end if
UnderConstruction end function
function make_publication_on_dokmag(idObjDPC,byref pDokMag , byref pPage) : make_publication_on_dokmag = true
if idObjDPC = 0 then exit function end if
#ifdef _ABAKUS if idObjDPC < 0 then 'dla wydruku bezpośredniego if pDokMag.nTypDok = N5REJESTRDOK__WZ then if pDokMag.curExtra5 = ccur(0.0) then pDokMag.curExtra5 = ccur(1.0) else if MessageBox("Dokument WZ był już drukowany. Czy wydrukować ponownie?", "Wydruk dokumentu WZ", vbYesNo, vbQuestion) <> vbYes then make_publication_on_dokmag = false exit function end if end if end if end if #endif
if not pPage.std_fsave_external_with_saveobjects() then make_publication_on_dokmag = false exit function end if
if (not pDokMag.pKlient is nothing) and is_email_publication(idObjDPC) then 'luki magazyn 60183
dim pM60153:set pM60153 = doc_.getmodule(60153) pM60153.choose_mail pDokMag.idobj,pDokMag.pKlient.idobj,pDokMag.type
if pM60153.get_g_sStrMail="" then MessageBox "Nie wysłano maila ... ","Informacja...", vbOKOnly, vbInformation else dim adresyEmail:adresyEmail=pM60153.get_g_sStrMail make_publication_on_dokmag = (realize_email_publication(abs(idObjDPC),pDokMag,adresyEmail,pDokMag.text,nothing) = 0)
end if else make_publication_on_dokmag = (realize_publication(abs(idObjDPC),pDokMag,idObjDPC>0,nothing) = 0) end if
end function
VBG_FUNCTIONS_NIEZMIENNE_WYDRUKI(zak_listZalacznik)
'---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
function fill_from_ewid_etyk(cMode,byref pDokMag , byref pPage) : fill_from_ewid_etyk = true if cMode <> "1" then exit function end if 'wybierz ewidencje etykiet dim choice : choice = fire_choice_list(TYPEID_N5DOKETYK ,"","","","","") if choice < 1 then fill_from_ewid_etyk = false exit function end if
fill_from_ewid_etyk = fill_from_ewid_etyk_internal(pDokMag , choice) end function
function fill_from_ewid_etyk_internal (byref pDokMag , byval idEE):fill_from_ewid_etyk_internal = false dim pUtil:set pUtil = doc_.getmodule(60245) dim rs:set rs = pUtil.get_rs(idEE) pUtil.fill_dokmag_by_rs pDokMag , rs , trans_.getobj(10166,idEE).text fill_from_ewid_etyk_internal = true end function
'------------------------------------ 'wypełnia dokument PW na podstawie RW '------------------------------------ function fill_from_rw(cMode, byref pDokMag, byref pPage) : fill_from_rw = true if cMode <> "1" then exit function end if dim idRW : idRW = fire_choice_list_disable_add(TYPEID_N5DOKMAG,"Wybierz dokument RW","","nTypDok = N5REJESTRDOK__RW","","") if idRW <> 0 then fill_from_rw = fill_pw_from_rw(pDokMag,idRW) else fill_from_rw = false end if end function
function fill_pw_from_rw(byref pDokPW, byval idRW) : fill_pw_from_rw = true 'pobierz dokument RW dim pDokMagRW : set pDokMagRW = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5DOKMAG,idRW)
'magazyn przyjęcia if pDokPW.pMagDocel is nothing then dim idMag : idMag = fire_choice_list_disable_add(TYPEID_N5MAGAZYN ,"Wybierz magazyn przyjęcia","","eTyp = N5TYPMAG_PODSTAWOWY","","") if idMag <> 0 then set pDokPW.pMagDocel = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5MAGAZYN,idMag) else fill_pw_from_rw = false exit function end if end if
'klient set pDokPW.pKlient = pDokMagRW.pKlient set pDokPW.pKlient_JO = pDokMagRW.pKlient_JO
'pozycje dim pPozDokRW for each pPozDokRW in pDokMagRW.listPozycje fill_pozpw_from_pozrw pDokPW.listPozycje, pPozDokRW next
'powiązanie z RW set pDokPW.pDokMag = pDokMagRW
end function
function fill_pozpw_from_pozrw(byref pPozPW, byref pPozDokRW) dim pPoz set pPoz = pPozPW.addnew()
'produkt i opakowanie set pPoz.pProdukt = pPozDokRW.pProdukt set pPoz.pOpak = pPozDokRW.pOpak
'ilość oraz cena magazynowa pPoz.curIloscOpak = curIloscCena(pPozDokRW,true) pPoz.curCenaMag = curIloscCena(pPozDokRW,false) end function
function curIloscCena(byref pPozDokRW,byval bIloscCena) : curIloscCena = ccur(0.0) dim strSQL : strSQL = "" if bIloscCena then 'ilość strSQL = "select 'suma'=abs(sum(gmo_curIlosc)) from n5gmop where gmo_nNumOp = " + cstr(pPozDokRW.parent.nNumOper) +_ " and gmo_pProd = " + cstr(pPozDokRW.pProdukt.IdObj) else 'cena strSQL = "select 'suma'=sum(gmo_curCena) from n5gmop where gmo_nNumOp = " + cstr(pPozDokRW.parent.nNumOper) +_ " and gmo_pProd = " + cstr(pPozDokRW.pProdukt.IdObj) end if dim oRS : set oRS = trans_.createadors(strSQL) if oRS.RecordCount <> 0 then curIloscCena = ccur(oRS("suma").value) end if end function

page.body:
QXF_BEGIN QXS_BEGIN_FLAT(SECID_ALL,Konfiguracja,FORM_SPAN)
QXX_CHOOSE_PUBLICATION(CTRLID_DPC_1,CTRLID_PIC_DPC_1,CTRLID_DPC_1_PREVIEW,1)
QXX_CHOOSE_PUBLICATION(CTRLID_DPC_2,CTRLID_PIC_DPC_2,CTRLID_DPC_2_PREVIEW,1)
QXR_SEPARATOR(2)
#comment NEXTVERSION - wywalic hide
QXC_LABEL(Zdarzenia,1)
zapamiętaj zdarzenie
QXR_LABELED_CHECK(CTRLID_FILL_IDEAL,Operacje,wypełnij zużyciem idealnym) QXR_LABELED_CHECK(CTRLID_SHOW_COLLECTOR,,Kolektor danych) QXR_LABELED_CHECK(CTRLID_FROM_EE,,Wypełnij z ewidencji etykiet) QXR_LABELED_CHECK(CTRLID_DRUK_ETYK,,Wydruk etykiet) QXR_LABELED_CHECK(CTRLID_SHOW_COLLECTOR_EXT,,Kolektor danych (rozszerzony)) QXR_LABELED_CHECK(CTRLID_FROM_RW,,Wypełnij z RW)
QXR_SEPARATOR(FORM_SPAN)
QXS_END_FLAT(FORM_SPAN) QXF_END
XFDIALOGBUTTONS
